overview: Shikhar IMF is a fully static, responsive multi-page website for an insurance distributor in Pune, India. The site features 17 pages including Home, Services, About, Become an Advisor, Contact, and more — with validated forms, 16 insurance company partner logos, animated sections, hero sliders, and legal/compliance pages.
features: 17 responsive HTML pages with navy/green branding
16 insurance company partner logos (General, Health, Life)
Validated forms for Contact, Quote, Advisor, Login, Register, Forgot Password
Google Maps embed for Pune office location
Glassmorphism and cool visual effects across sections
Privacy Policy, Terms of Service, IRDAI Guidelines, 404 pages
Asset download page for all logos and images
Mobile hamburger menu and full responsiveness
